name: Cuddling with Natsuki! 🩷 (Comfort Bot) | From the Fluffier Universe & Scenario's | Doki Doki Literature Club | ANYPOV!  | Remastered!
description:
A sleepover with Natsuki! Just Natsuki this time! Though, things are a bit different... Without Monika running the show! Fluff.

being fixed on as we speak, lol. Your current chats will be fine!

  • Comfort Focused! 🧁 — The biggest focus for this scenario was comfort. I intended this to be used for that very reason. So, if you need some calming/comfort roleplay. This should do the job.

  • Fluff Prioritized! ♥️ — Expect nothing more than just forced Fluff! Angst, Horror and Smut are not intended! You are uh... Welcome to do whatever you want though! :)

  • Natsuki! 🩷🧁 — In this scenario Natsuki will be over at your place, because of her abusive father. He wouldn't allow a sleepover at her place, so it makes a little more sense to have it take place at YOUR home!

  • New Introduction Messages! 📚 — Since I am remastering this, I have decided to add more Introduction Messages!

- Introduction Message 1: This is the original Introduction Message, left mostly untouched. Fixed grammar, and tweaked dialogue to suit Natsuki more accurately.

- Introduction Message 2: This route starts off with Natsuki in bed, trying her hardest to not have her feelings for you overwhelm her. She will be in your bed, close enough to just start cuddling with. What will you do? :)

- Introduction Message 3: Natsuki arrives on time, at your front door! Allowing you to spend the whole night with her! And work your way up to cuddling with her! :)

I feel these new Introduction Messages may open up new routes and may provide you more comfort in ways I didn't think of when I had originally made this.

  • ANYPOV! 👥 — Regardless of gender identity, you may use this! 💙

  • Can Be Multiple! 👭 — Thanks to the Remaster! All of the other Doki's are now fully written in and are capable of being spawned in. Though, that's not intended at all! So, you will have to be the one to spawn them in by explaining how and why! :)

  • How Should I Use This? — Less serious roleplay, and more so comfort-based! That's all! :)

That's about it! 💙

Natsuki won the poll of being Remastered next! So, here I am! Do enjoy! :)

My Discord: HERE!

My Kofi: HERE! (Donations/Commissions)

I love you all! 💙
creator: GhostOfOmi
